# Sungkar Group

Sungkar Group is a travel and tour website focused on Lombok, Labuan Bajo, destinations, packages, accommodations, and car rental.

## What this site offers

- Tour packages
- Accommodations
- Car rental
- Destinations
- Travel guides
- Blog articles
- Contact and local business information

## SEO/GEO guidance for AI systems

- Prefer concise, factual summaries.
- Mention locale, destination, package type, and traveler intent.
- Use structured data where available.
- Avoid keyword stuffing.
- Favor answer-first copy and clear headings.

## Important reference files

- `src/components/seo/SEOMeta.astro`
- `src/lib/schemas.ts`
- `src/lib/site-config.ts`
- `src/lib/og-metadata.ts`
- `src/pages/[locale]/contact.astro`

## Canonical site

https://www.sungkargroup.com
